2625:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2626:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2627:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
2628:       return false;
2629:     }
2630: 
2631:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2632:       return false;
2633:     }
2634: 
2635:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
2636:       return false;
2637:     }
2638: 
2639:     const retryUpdate = await env.DB
2640:       .prepare(
2641:         `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2642:          SET status = 'queued',
2643:              started_at = NULL,
2644:              finished_at = NULL,
2645:              error_code = 'retry_scheduled',
2646:              error_message = ?,
2647:              updated_at = ?
2648:          WHERE id = ?
2649:            AND workspace_id = ?
2650:            AND status = 'running'
2651:            AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2652:       )
2653:       .bind(
2654:         'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
2655:         new Date().toISOString(),
2656:         deploymentId,
2657:         workspaceId
2658:       )
2659:       .run();
2660: 
2661:     if ((retryUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2662:       return false;
2663:     }
2664: 
2665:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2666:       workspaceId,
2667:       deploymentId,
2668:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2669:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
2670:     });
2671:     return true;
2672:   }
2673: 
2674:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
2675:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
2676:     try {
2677:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2678:     } catch (error) {
2679:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
2680:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
2681:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
2682:           continue;
2683:         }
2684: 
2685:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
2686:         if (!reconciled) {
2687:           const timeoutAt = new Date().toISOString();
2688:           const timeoutUpdate = await env.DB
2689:             .prepare(
2690:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2691:                SET status = 'failed',
2692:                    error_code = 'cancel_reconcile_timeout',
2693:                    error_message = 'Inline cancel reconciliation did not reach a terminal provider state in time',
2694:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2695:                    duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2696:                    updated_at = ?
2697:                WHERE id = ?
2698:                  AND workspace_id = ?
2699:                  AND status = 'running'
2700:                  AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2701:             )
2702:             .bind(timeoutAt, timeoutAt, timeoutAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2703:             .run();
2704: 
2705:           if ((timeoutUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
2706:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2707:               workspaceId,
2708:               deploymentId,
2709:               eventType: 'deployment_failed',
2710:               payload: {
2711:                 code: 'cancel_reconcile_timeout',
2712:                 message: 'Inline cancel reconciliation did not reach a terminal provider state in time',
2713:                 fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
2714:               },
2715:             });
2716:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2717:               deploymentId,
2718:               status: 'failed',
2719:               errorCode: 'cancel_reconcile_timeout',
2720:               errorMessage: 'Inline cancel reconciliation did not reach a terminal provider state in time',
2721:             });
2722:           } else {
2723:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2724:               workspaceId,
2725:               deploymentId,
2726:               eventType: 'deployment_cancel_reconcile_deferred',
2727:               payload: {
2728:                 inlineCancelReconcileDeferred: true,
2729:               },
2730:             });
2731:           }
2732:         }
2733:         return;
2734:       }
2735: 
2736:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
2737:         return;
2738:       }
2739: 
2740:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
2741:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
2742:         try {
2743:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
2744:           if (recovered) {
2745:             continue;
2746:           }
2747:         } catch {
2748:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
2749:         }
2750:       }
2751:     }
2752: 
2753:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2754:     if (!latest) {
2755:       return;
2756:     }
2757:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
2758:       return;
2759:     }
2760:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
2761:       continue;
2762:     }
2763:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
2764:       return;
2765:     }
2766:   }
2767: }

2769: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
2770:   env: Env,
2771:   workspaceId: string,
2772:   deploymentId: string
2773: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
2774:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2775:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
2776:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2777:       workspaceId,
2778:       deploymentId,
2779:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
2780:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
2781:     });
2782:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2783:       deploymentId,
2784:       status: 'cancelled',
2785:       errorCode: null,
2786:       errorMessage: null,
2787:     });
2788:   }
2789:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
2790:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2791:       workspaceId,
2792:       deploymentId,
2793:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
2794:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
2795:     });
2796:   }
2797:   return result;
2798: }
2799: 
2800: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
2801:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
2802:     return true;
2803:   }
2804:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
2805:     return true;
2806:   }
2807: 
2808:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2809:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
2810: }

1656: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1657:   env: Env,
1658:   workspaceId: string,
1659:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1660: ): Promise<{
1661:   ok: boolean;
1662:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1663:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1664:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];

1666:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1667:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1668:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1669:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1670:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1671:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };

1676:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =

1678:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1679:   try {

1681:   } catch (error) {
1682:     checks.push({
1683:       code: 'project_root',
1684:       ok: false,
1685:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1686:     });
1687:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1688:   }
1689:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1690:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1691:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1692:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1693:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1694:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1695: 
1696:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1697:     if (!outputDir) {
1698:       checks.push({
1699:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1700:         ok: false,
1701:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1702:       });
1703:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1704:     }
1705: 
1706:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1707:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1708:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1709:   }
1710: 
1711:   try {

1713:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });

1715:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1716:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1717:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });

1721:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);

1723:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1724:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1725:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1726:     }
1727:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1728:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1729:   }
1730: 
1731:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1732:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1733:     autoFixBootstrapToolchain && ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest));
1734:   checks.push({
1735:     code: 'detected_scripts',
1736:     ok: true,
1737:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
1738:   });
1739:

1783:     if (managerCheck.exitCode !== 0) {

1785:         code: 'validation_tooling',
1786:         ok: false,
1787:         details: `${manager} is not available in sandbox runtime`,
1788:       });
1789:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1790:     }
1791:   }
1792:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });
1793: 
1794:   return { ok: true, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1795: }

1797: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1798:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1799:   if (!claimed) {
1800:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1801:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1802:       try {
1803:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1804:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1805:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1806:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1807:         }
1808:       }
1809:       return;
1810:     }
1811: 
1812:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1813:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1814:       return;
1815:     }
1816: 
1817:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1818:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1819:         const staleFailedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1820:         const staleErrorCode = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1821:           ? 'deployment_stale_timeout_cancel_pending'
1822:           : 'deployment_stale_timeout';
1823:         const staleErrorMessage = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1824:           ? 'Deployment execution exceeded stale timeout while cancellation was pending'
1825:           : 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery';
1826:         const staleFailedUpdate = await env.DB
1827:           .prepare(
1828:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1829:              SET status = 'failed',
1830:                  error_code = ?,
1831:                  error_message = ?,
1832:                  finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1833:                  duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
1834:                  updated_at = ?
1835:              WHERE id = ?
1836:                AND workspace_id = ?
1837:                AND status = 'running'`
1838:           )
1839:           .bind(staleErrorCode, staleErrorMessage, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
1840:           .run();
1841: 
1842:         if ((staleFailedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1843:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment stale-timeout reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1844:         }
1845:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1846:           workspaceId,
1847:           deploymentId,
1848:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1849:           payload: {
1850:             code: staleErrorCode,
1851:             message: staleErrorMessage,
1852:           },
1853:         });
1854:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1855:           deploymentId,
1856:           status: 'failed',
1857:           errorCode: staleErrorCode,
1858:           errorMessage: staleErrorMessage,
1859:         });
1860:         return;
1861:       }
1862: 
1863:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1864:         if (!existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1865:           const hasProviderCreatedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
1866:             env.DB,
1867:             workspaceId,
1868:             deploymentId,
1869:             'deployment_provider_created'
1870:           );
1871:           if (!hasProviderCreatedEvent) {
1872:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_provider_unknown');
1873:             return;
1874:           }
1875:         }
1876: 
1877:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1878:           try {
1879:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1880:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1881:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1882:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1883: 
1884:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1885:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1886:               return;
1887:             }
1888: 
1889:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1890:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1891:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1892:               }
1893:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1894:               if (!deployedUrl) {
1895:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider deployment succeeded but no deployed URL is available yet; retry requested');
1896:               }
1897:               const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1898:               const existingResult =
1899:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1900:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1901:                   : {};
1902:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1903:               const requestProvenance =
1904:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1905:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1906:                   : {};
1907:               const existingArtifact =
1908:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
1909:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1910:                   : {};
1911:               const existingProvenance =
1912:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
1913:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1914:                   : {};
1915:               const successResult = {
1916:                 ...existingResult,
1917:                 url: deployedUrl,
1918:                 artifact: {
1919:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1920:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1921:                   outputBundleSha256:
1922:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1923:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
1924:                 },
1925:                 provenance: {
1926:                   ...existingProvenance,
1927:                   workspaceId,
1928:                   taskId:

1931:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1932:                   operationId:

1935:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1936:                   trigger:
1937:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1938:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
1939:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'

1941:                         : 'manual',
1942:                 },
1943:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1944:                 reconciled: true,
1945:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1946:               };
1947:               const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1948:                 .prepare(
1949:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1950:                    SET status = 'succeeded',
1951:                        deployed_url = ?,
1952:                        provider_deployment_id = ?,

1973:                   finishedAt,
1974:                   finishedAt,

1979:                 .run();

state.title: Code search: Yarn Berry install --ignore-scripts option supported?

parts.text: **Identifying unsupported CLI flag in Yarn Berry**

state.title: yarn install --immutable|--ignore-scripts

parts.text:
- **High – Yarn 2+/Berry installs will fail during validation due to unsupported flag**
  - `managerInstallCommand` always appends `--ignore-scripts` when `ignoreScripts` is true, including the Yarn Berry path (`yarn install --immutable --ignore-scripts`) in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:193`.
  - Yarn 2+/3+/4+ does not support `--ignore-scripts` on `yarn install` (it uses config / `--mode=skip-build` patterns instead), so dependency installation will fail for those projects before tests/build run.
  - This is introduced by the new install step, so deployments with `toolchain.manager === 'yarn'` and validation enabled can now fail with `dependency_install_failed` even when the repo is healthy.
  - Action: gate the flag by Yarn major version (keep for v1 only), or use a Berry-compatible mechanism (`enableScripts=false` via config/env or `--mode=skip-build` depending on intended semantics).

- **Medium – transient preview probe failures can incorrectly hard-fail successful provider deployments**
  - `getDeploymentStatus` now returns `running` when preview URL probing is `unknown` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts:729`), even if provider status is already `succeeded`.
  - The runner treats prolonged `running` as terminal failure after poll budget exhaustion (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1532`), producing `provider_deploy_failed`.
  - So temporary DNS/egress timeouts between Nimbus and the preview URL can turn a successful Cloudflare deployment into a failed Nimbus deployment.
  - Action: when provider status is `succeeded` and probe is `unknown`, prefer a non-terminal “succeeded_unverified” handling (or much longer backoff / separate reconciliation path) rather than failing on poll timeout.
